sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86472" key="proakroboli/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προακροβολίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n86472.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">skirmish with missiles before the battle,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:163" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.163</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
